entry.title: CL_SALV_TABLE number of rows
entry.content:
Hi!

I have an ALV created with cl_salv_table, and i need to display the total number of rows in the list header, and refresh it if any filer is applied.
I googled a lot and found only this as working solution: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/oo-salv-cl-salv-table-how-to-count-number-of-records-displayed/td-p/8119965 
You loop at the filers, collect them, and apply them to your itab, than count the number of rows in it.

It works but i cant beleive that there is no better way to solve this since 2011.

Can you suggest me a better solution?

(SAP ABAP, release 700)

entry.title: Re: Have promblem with GUI_UPLOAD
entry.content: We do not have the crystall ball (there is no code!) but right away I would suggest to keep conversion exits in mind and check what types you are using for the structure fields

entry.title: SAP TechEd 2024: The Future of Intelligent Enterprises Unveiled
entry.content:
SAP TechEd 2024, held both virtually and in Las Vegas, brought together technology enthusiasts, developers, and enterprise leaders to explore the latest innovations in SAP technologies. This year’s event was packed with keynotes, expert sessions, hands-on workshops, and a glimpse into the future of intelligent enterprises. Whether you attended in person or online, the excitement was commendable, and the energy was contagious.

Opening Keynote: Building the Intelligent, Sustainable Enterprise

The event kicked off with an inspiring keynote from SAP CEO Christian Klein, who emphasized SAP’s commitment to innovation, sustainability, and enabling businesses to become intelligent enterprises. He highlighted the importance of digital transformation and how SAP is paving the way with groundbreaking solutions that prioritize sustainability, AI, and enhanced user experiences.

Key Highlights:

  • SAP Business AI: Announcement of new AI capabilities integrated into SAP S/4HANA, designed to automate routine tasks, improve data-driven decision-making, and optimize business processes.
  • Sustainability at the Core: Introduction of new sustainability features that help companies monitor and minimize their carbon footprint, track resource usage, and improve supply chain transparency.
  • SAP Fiori Evolution: Enhanced user interface with a focus on accessibility and a more intuitive design, making it easier for users to navigate and interact with SAP applications.


SAP Virtual – The new and improved Dashboard


New Announcements and Innovations

SAP TechEd 2024 had no shortage of exciting new announcements. Here are some of the key innovations revealed during the event:

  • Expanded AI Capabilities

SAP Business AI was a central theme throughout the event, with new AI features showcased across multiple products. From predictive analytics in SAP S/4HANA to conversational AI for customer support, SAP demonstrated how AI is being seamlessly integrated to enhance business processes.

  • SAP Build Process Automation

A major highlight was the announcement of updates to SAP Build, aimed at making process automation more accessible to users of all technical levels. The low-code/no-code platform now includes pre-built templates, drag-and-drop tools, and enhanced integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

  • SAP Datasphere Enhancements

The data management solution, SAP Datasphere, received new capabilities, making it easier to connect, manage, and analyze data across various sources. The enhancements include improved data governance, real-time analytics, and deeper integration with third-party data platforms.

Developer and Learning Tracks

One of the best parts of SAP TechEd is the wealth of learning opportunities. This year’s event featured over 500 sessions, including workshops, expert-led talks, and networking opportunities. Some popular tracks included:

 

  1. Future-Proofing with SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform)

Sessions focused on helping developers leverage the SAP Business Technology Platform to build, extend, and integrate applications. There were workshops on using SAP Integration Suite, building custom apps with SAP BTP, and harnessing the power of SAP AI.

  • The Path to Clean Code and Efficient Development

An emphasis was placed on clean code principles, efficient development, and best practices for building scalable solutions. Developers got hands-on experience with SAP’s latest development tools, ensuring they are ready to build future-ready applications.

  • Enhancing User Experience with SAP Fiori

Experts guided attendees through the latest updates to SAP Fiori, including the new design elements and features that make applications more intuitive and responsive. There were live demos showcasing how to customize the Fiori Launchpad and build applications with improved accessibility.

Hands-On Workshops and Demos

SAP TechEd 2024 didn’t just talk about innovation—it allowed attendees to experience it firsthand. Attendees participated in hands-on workshops to build applications using SAP BTP, explore machine learning with SAP AI, and configure real-time data flows in SAP Datasphere.

Some Popular Workshops:

  • "Building Scalable Applications with SAP BTP": Participants created cloud-native applications and learned best practices for integrating them with SAP S/4HANA.
  • "Automate Business Processes with SAP Build": A practical session on designing and automating workflows without writing a single line of code.
  • "Data-Driven Insights with SAP Analytics Cloud": Attendees explored how to visualize and analyze data using the SAP Analytics Cloud, with a focus on real-time data.

Networking and Community Engagement

One of the major draws of SAP TechEd is the opportunity to connect with peers, SAP experts, and industry leaders. Networking lounges, breakout sessions, and even virtual chatrooms were bustling with activity as attendees exchanged ideas, discussed challenges, and explored collaboration opportunities.

SAP Community Awards
The event also celebrated the achievements of the SAP community with awards recognizing developers, partners, and businesses that have made significant contributions to the ecosystem. It was a proud moment for many, reinforcing the strong collaborative spirit within the SAP community.

Key Takeaways from SAP TechEd 2024

  • AI and Automation Are the Future

SAP’s commitment to integrating AI into its core products signals a future where routine tasks can be automated, allowing businesses to focus on strategic initiatives.

  • Focus on Sustainability

With sustainability becoming a global imperative, SAP’s solutions are enabling businesses to measure and minimize their environmental impact, helping them to meet regulatory requirements and improve their corporate responsibility.

  • Empowering the Developer Community

From expanded capabilities in SAP BTP to enhanced tools for building and automating processes, SAP TechEd 2024 reinforced the message that developers are at the heart of driving digital transformation.

The Future Innovation with SAP Builders
Innovation is the key to future. There is SAP Builders group to engage with a community of peers to unleash innovation: SAP Builders - SAP Community

In-person events for SAP TechEd 2024 
There are multiple in person events for SAP TechEd2024 the timelines are as follows:
• ASUG Tech Connect 2024: November 12–14, 2024 in West Palm Beach, Florida
• SAUG-x 2024:                      November 19–20, 2024 in Melbourne, Australia
• UKISUG Connect 2024:      December 1–3, 2024 in Birmingham, United Kingdom
• SAPinsider EMEA 2024:     November 12–14, 2024 in Copenhagen, Denmark
• DSAG-TechXchange 2025: April 4, 2025 in Wiesbaden, Germany

Sponsors of this TechEd 2024

Summary

SAP TechEd 2024 was a showcase of the future of enterprise technology, highlighting the tools and innovations that will shape businesses for years to come. Whether you were there in person or joined online, the event offered a comprehensive look at how SAP is driving the digital transformation journey.

Excited to look forward to whats in store with SAP TechEd 2025!
SAP TechEd Subscription
Cheers!

entry.title: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes. Its getting you are not entitled for SAP note
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes.

Its getting you are not entitled for SAP/KBA Note.

Best Regards,

S-User

entry.title: Wrap up of the third SAP Tech Night (9th Oct 2024)
entry.content:
Hi Melbourne Community,

Hope everyone had an great time at the SAP Tech Night recently held on 9th Oct. 

I find it always insightful to hear to the discussion which happens during these type of events, helps me grow as a SAP Consultant.

Would you like to present at the next tech night which is happening on the 4th Dec from 5.30pm to 8.30pm please let us know. 

Cheers,

SAP Melbourne Community

entry.title: REPS ZDELSTOR
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an issue when i try to implement a NOTE i have an error it mentionne Object REPS ZDELSTOR not availaible and i must to creat it befor to apply a note.

How to create this object.

kind regards.

entry.title: Re: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes. Its getting you are not entitled for SAP
entry.content: I guess your S-User is not authorized to view the SAP notes.

entry.title: Re: Web dynpro
entry.content: Add an element of type layout with vertical positioning, in which you embed your elements.

entry.title: Enterprise Architecture: Enterprise Blockchain Platform Business Capability Map 🚀
entry.content:
As Enterprise Architects, bringing an Enterprise Blockchain Platform into our Organisation and positioning the Enterprise Blockchain Platform as a Technology Standard, part of this EA  process is to map the Business Capabilities of the Enterprise Blockchain Platform.

And that's what this Thread is about, a resource for EA's who are mapping the Business Capabilities of the Enterprise Blockchain Platform.

The following diagram is one we've drawn to show the L1, L2, L3 Capabilities of the Enterprise Blockchain Platform:

 

Enterprise Blockchain Platform Business Capability Map

 

 

And the horizontal version:

 

Enterprise Blockchain Platform Business Capability Map

 

 
Have we missed anything ?
How would you draw it ?
 
With this in place can then let the Use Case find the Blockchain.
 

What do you think, are the words Blockchain, Web3, Distributed Ledger Technology, starting to appear in your Company's visions and technology visions ? What use cases are you looking at ? How are you positioning it ? Let's chat about it in the comments.

Andy Silvey.

Independent SAP Technical Architect and CEO of atkrypto

Author Bio:

Andy Silvey is a 25 years SAP Technology veteran [15 years SAP Basis and 10 years SAP Tech Arch including Tech, Integration, Security, Data from 3.1H to S/4HANA PCE on RISE and the BTP and everything in between, and former SCN Moderator and Mentor alumni].

Andy is also co-Founder of atkrypto inc, an startup whose ambition is to make Blockchain easy for Enterprise.

atkrypto's flagship product is the atkrypto Enterprise Blockchain Platform for SAP,  and atkrypto is a SAP Partner Edge Open EcoSystem Partner. 

The atkrypto Enterprise Blockchain Platform for SAP has been designed by SAP Independent Experts for the needs of SAP Customers and to be deployed on the SAP BTP Kyma Runtime Service and leverage native integration to SAP Products.

atkrypto Enterprise Blockchain Platform for SAP has a number of unique qualities, including being the only Blockchain software in the world which has a DataCenter version and a light mobile version which can run on Edge/IoT/Mobile devices and enables data to be written to the Blockchain at the Edge where that same Blockchain is running on a Server in the DataCenter, protecting the integrity and originality of data from the Edge to Insights. Taking Blockchain to the Data at the Edge instead of taking the Data to the Blockchain.

entry.title: Include products for capacity utilization calculation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
For Production Resource, in the standard available KFs - a KF is available which states how many Products were planned at the Resource-Location level.
The requirement is - there are 100 products being planned at the same Resource-Location.
Out of the 100 products, 20 products belong to a particular business segment. As per standard Utilization calculation it always does at the Resource-Location level, hence product visibility is not there.
How can we derive this with configuration in SAP IBP heuristics.

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP S/4HANA with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (AEM) using AIF
entry.content:
Hi @christian_h,

the integration is done per pure REST Calls. The connection is uni-directional. For inbound communication a REST endpoint is needed, where are the events are replicated in.

Regards,

Christian

entry.title: Re: XML Schema 1.1 assertions in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: Thanks for this great blog! Does anyone know if it’s possible to validate directly against a Schematron file nowadays? Maybe using Groovy?

entry.title: Publication from optimized design mode not possible with story filter.
entry.content:
Hi, 

In a SAP Analytics Cloud publication of a SAC story in optimized design mode, the story filter option is missing:

It has been available when using a story in classic design mode:

Is there an alternative solution available?

Thanks a lot! Matthias

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.2: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.2 is now available. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is based on the technical product SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

To access the Final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

For further formats and languages of the What's New information, as well as pre-filtered views, please use the following SAP S/4HANA Cloud Help Portal page.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.2 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access the Product Assistance in multiple languages.

For you as a customers, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.2 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

There is a new commenting feature available for What’s New. Authors can now evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. 

To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP S/4HANA with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (AEM) using AIF

Regards,

Christian

entry.title: Re: CL_SALV_TABLE number of rows
entry.content: If your SALV is built on an ALV Grid (CL_GUI_ALV_GRID), you may get its instance (search the Web) and use the method GET_FILTERED_ENTRIES.

entry.title: Re: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes...
entry.content: Then what authorizations I need to get it. Could you please mention here.

entry.title: Re: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes...
entry.content: The authorization to view the SAP notes. Just ask your administrator.

entry.title: Extract ANLB Depreciation Terms Data in CSV File Using ABAP Program For Selected Cost Center
entry.content:
FIXED ASSET Extract ANLB Depreciation Terms Data in CSV File Using ABAP Program For Selected Cost Center

ABAP Program 12) Z_ANLB_FIXED_ASSET 

  • Program Type – ABAP  
  • ABAP Program Name – Z_ANLB_FIXED_ASSET 
  • Tcode - Z_ANLB_FA 
  • Entity Description - Depreciation terms 
  • Output File Location - “C:\tmp” 
  • Output File Name- ANLB.CSV 
  • Output File Type – CSV (Column with Semicolon separator (;) 
  • SAP Table Name – ANLB 
  • List of fields to be extracted -  
  • ANLN1 
  • NDJAR 
  • NDPER 
  • AFABG 
  • AFASL 

----------ABAP Program Start From Here-----------------------

REPORT  Z_ANLB_FIXED_ASSET.
 
TYPE-POOLS: VRM.
 
DATA: NAME  TYPE VRM_ID,
      LIST  TYPE VRM_VALUES,
      VALUE LIKE LINE OF LIST.
 
PARAMETERS: ENTITY(10) AS LISTBOX VISIBLE LENGTH 10.
PARAMETERS : OPATH TYPE STRING DEFAULT '\\SERVERNAME\tmp\KNB1.csv'.
 
AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
 
NAME = 'ENTITY'.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK01'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK01'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK75'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK75'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK21'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK21'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK31'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK31'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK41'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK41'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK02'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK02'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK73'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK73'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK04'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK04'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
VALUE-KEY = 'UK61'.
VALUE-TEXT = 'UK61'.
APPEND VALUE TO LIST.
 
CALL FUNCTION 'VRM_SET_VALUES' EXPORTING ID = NAME VALUES = LIST.
 
START-OF-SELECTION.
type-pools:TRUXS.
data: begin of itab occurs 0,
      anln1 like anlb-anln1,
  ndjar like anlb-ndjar,
  nbper like anlb-ndper,
  afabg like anlb-afabg,
          afasl like anlb-afasl,
          BUKRS like anlb-BUKRS,
      end of itab.
data:  itab1 type TRUXS_T_TEXT_DATA.
 select  ANLB~anln1
ANLB~ndjar
ANLB~ndper
ANLB~afabg
                 ANLB~afasl
                 ANLB~BUKRS
         from ANLB
         INNER JOIN ANLA ON ANLB~ANLN1 = ANLA~ANLN1
 
         into table itab
         WHERE ANLB~BUKRS = ENTITY AND ANLA~DEAKT IN ('00000000').
 
CALL FUNCTION 'SAP_CONVERT_TO_CSV_FORMAT'
 EXPORTING
   I_FIELD_SEPERATOR          = ','
  TABLES
    I_TAB_SAP_DATA             = itab
 CHANGING
   I_TAB_CONVERTED_DATA       =  itab1
 EXCEPTIONS
   CONVERSION_FAILED          = 1
   OTHERS                     = 2
          .
IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
 MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
         WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
ENDIF.
 
   CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      filename = OPATH
    TABLES
      data_tab = itab1
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS   = 1.

entry.title: Re: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content: Please check if the following subforms "MaterialData_Subform", "Data_Subform" and "Header" subforms are set to flowed layout. If they are not, please set it to flowed and see if it helps

entry.title: Re: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes...
entry.content: I am the user administrator. Although i have all authorizations. Even i cant able to see the KBA Notes

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub - Myths and Misconceptions - Part 2 (Migration)
entry.content:
Thanks so much Dalibor for the quick turn-around!

Let us digest the content and discuss with the business - in parallel will try to make progress with the upgrade. Hopefully soon we will be able to try and test TIH functionalities on our own!

Will keep you posted on how it goes!

kindly,

Carla

entry.title: Re: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content:
Hello @Mahmood99 ,

Here the application does not know where is from your oData service. 
If it's an external one, you should define the model in this way:
var oModel = new ODataModel("http://services.odata.org/Northwind/Northwind.svc/");
But you will have a security issue, and you need to change your configuration files. 

The best approach as I see you are using the manifest, is to define the destination. 
Here some blog and answers can help you:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/destination-service-how-it-can-be-used/ba-p/13472295
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-connect-sapui5-app-with-destination-in-cloudfoundry/qaq-p/632173
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/cloud-foundry-authentication-how-it-works-step-by-step/ba-p/13395135

entry.title: Re: sap prints pdf windows 11
entry.content: can you be more descriptive? How is this PDF generated. Using ADS or any third party software

entry.title: Re: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes. Its getting you are not entitled for SAP
entry.content: I am the user administrator. Although i have all authorizations. Even i cant able to see the KBA Notes

entry.title: Re: Footnote in adobe form
entry.content: You can check the current page number using xfa.layout.page(this) and based on that ou can decide to show or hide the objects. Make sure you run this on layout ready event

entry.title: Re: Retry failed messages in CPI with automatic and manual reprocessing capabilities
entry.content:
Hi

There  is a lto fo design that goes into building a reliable way of sending messages and enable you to monitor them. 

The default number of queues are 30. You can self upgrade it to 100. And then you can open OSS for more queues. But there is a clear limit for it. 

You can also look into the PIpeline concept as a genric way to handle reprocessing. 

 

Daniel Graversen

Figaf

For now explore it otheger with Figaf DevOps tool, we have a UI for working with Partner Directory.

entry.title: Re: IW51/IW52 Add two tasks when one action box item is clicked
entry.content:
Hi Raymond_giuseppi,

Thanks for taking the time to reply. 

While configuring the follow up functions for the action box of a notification type, there is an option to give a function module. This function module gets triggered when the corresponding function is clicked in the action box. To my understanding, the FM is used for validations, sending external emails, triggering workflows or similar requirements. For the ZFM the signature of QM06_FM* is copied. There is no logic in the ZFM to add the task. 

Irrespective of the existence of the ZFM (or any standard FM) the task gets added based on config when the follow up function in the action box is clicked. Now my question is,

1. Can the FM option of the follow up function be leveraged to add 2 records in the task tab when a follow up function is clicked in the action box? If yes how.

2. Is there any other way of achieving this using exits or enhancements?

Kindly let me know if further information is required. 

Thank you.

entry.title: digital skills initiative
entry.content: Hi, I'm Ameer Hamza Khan from Islamabad, Pakistan. I'm very interested in learning SAP Project Systems, and this digital skills initiative will be a big help in advancing my career.

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Implementing Custom Chart of Acc...
entry.content:
Hi,

In S/4HANA Cloud public edition, it is not possible to create a new chart of accounts to replace the standard operational chart of accounts YCOA.
What is recommended is to adapt the standard chart of accounts YCOA to the customer's needs.

Detail please check the following KBA note,

3426847 - How to create customized Chart of Accounts in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?

https://me.sap.com/notes/3426847

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Re: Q&A - "How to configure SAP Identity Provisioning Service to connect to SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In this blog here it mentions that there are three ways to provision users in SAP Analytics Cloud:

-SAP Analytics Cloud User Interface

-SAML

-SCIM API.

Could someone please point me to the documentation for SAML user provisioning and the SAP Analytics Cloud User Interface so I can compare them?

Thank you!

Best regards

can you help?

entry.title: Annotation Error
entry.content:
Hi, after deploying an overview page with several cards, we getting an error in an internal gateway system:

Source must contain an annotation object to be merged. The annotation file itself seems also not to be loaded... when testing in webide everything works fine.

entry.title: Re: 6 ways AI is changing the construction game
entry.content: AI is revolutionizing the construction industry by enhancing project planning, improving safety, streamlining processes, and increasing efficiency. From predictive analytics to autonomous machinery, AI is making construction smarter and faster. For industries like gaming, AI advancements can also improve gaming dedicated servers. If you need reliable hosting solutions, HostNoc offers excellent options.

entry.title: How to change source HU during picking by using exception code
entry.content: I want to change source HU during picking process, how can I do that, by using exception codes? CHHU does not work, it changes only the destination HU.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Deactivating users programmatically
entry.content: Hello @Matthew_Shaw, thanks again for all these details, really appreciated. Is it also possible to outline the steps needed for setting up SAC user activation/deactivation for customers leveraging SAP IPS?

entry.title: Want to procure S4 Hana Sandbox both on prem and cloud, want to confirm which material ID to go with
entry.content:
We want to procure S4 Hana Sandbox both on prem and cloud, want to confirm which material ID to go with. Have seen these as relevant ones;

1. 8012331 - Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, one-system landscape

2. 8013903 - Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for supplier quotation and price renegotiation

3. 8014572 - Cloud test, demo, and development for SAP S/4HANA for Procurement Planning

Please help us understand which one would be relevant

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Deactivating users programmatically
entry.content: Hi JefB, Good question. The activation status is just the .isActive property. Its either true or false. This is a property the IdP also has for a user, and it can be passed down or updated via the SCIM API. I have an idea the 'isActive' property is often used by the IdP for a 'whole user' setting, rather than just 'disable SAC for this user'. But I guess you could define a different property in the IdP and map that to .isActive to do that job. Sorry I don't have a full solution, or steps, just this outline idea. Kind regards, Matthew

entry.title: Re: FICA House bank info in fica document
entry.content:
Hello,

We solved this issue as follows: we pushed 2 reconciliation keys that have house bank information and they will make zero balance on the gl side (surpass the error in debug mode) and we created the correct payment lot. Sap provided those OSS notes for not having this issue 

3300015     Payment Lot Reconciliation House Bank/Account correction
3227978     Bank Clearing Account Validation
3201149     Payment lot - default values for house bank

entry.title: Re: SoD review request generated for only one user
entry.content: i have the same problem. does anyone know a solution?

entry.title: Re: Using transport of copies and deploy several features to production with SAP Cloud ALM in conjun
entry.content:
Hi Moritz,

thanks for informative blog. I wanted to check if Dev and Quality systems have mismatch in the Software Components or with their Versions even if the same components are installed, is there any way to configure Cloud ALM to ignore this mismatch and still import ToC or Transport Request in the Transport Target?

Kind regards,

Raj

entry.title: Issue with consolidated inventory mode in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I moved today to consolidated inventory mode at our SAP DM test tenant. The idea is to move our production tenenat as well as soon it is working on the test tenant.

But I am getting the error message Material 00000022236 was not found. I followed the integration guide Inventory Management Mode | SAP Help Portal and since we are in a scenario with plant mapping I followed the SAP note  3419986 - Implementing Read and Synchronize ERP Inventory in Consolidated Mode for SAP S/4HANA Integration with Plant Conversion - SAP for Me

But still no succesful result. Attached you can see a screenshot of the error message in "Integration Message Dashboard" and the Response Payload of the Submessage. 

The Response Payload of the Submessage mentions the Sub notes 1797736 and 1869434. But these notes are referring to self developed Services. 

Any ideas of what else I can check fo fix the problem?

entry.title: Re: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes...
entry.content: Then, contact the SAP support. Did you find the solution?

entry.title: Platform user for Destination WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
I configured the destination WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER according to the documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configure-destination-for-live-process-projects 

When I entered my Universal ID mail address and password, it was working. The Check Connection shows: Connection to "WM_CF_SPACE_PROVIDER" established. Response returned: "404: Not Found", so no 401 anymore.

The documentation says, I should use a platform user from the default identity provider and that I should not use a SAP Universal ID user. However the only way I got this destination working was to enter my Universal ID information.

As this destination is shared in the whole subaccount I would like to create a different user and add this to this destination (That's also what the BTP cockpit advices me to do).

Where should I create such a user? The only way I can think of is creating it as a Universal ID user, however  the documentation tells me I should not use a Universal ID user. Also, this requires me to create another mail address to keep the user separate from my Universal ID which is not nice.

entry.title: Re: Creation of a simple Turnover Analysis with Stories in People Analytics
entry.content:
Hi, All:

I'm having issues with the formula for termination counter. This is a basic formula and I'm not sure what the problem is. The counter is not counting. I did go through the 2nd picture and change the measure to a dimension, to a measure - sum just in case and it's still not working. Does anyone see anything?

entry.title: Re: Custom ABAP Class using SO_DOCUMENT_READ_API1
entry.content: SWF_RUN647: "Exception &1 raised by &2 in line &3 with text: &4". What are the values of &1, etc.? You have searched the Web, right, so what did you do? https://www.google.com/search?q=CX_SY_REF_IS_INITIAL+raised+by+CL_SWF_UTL_RUN_CLIF_METHOD%20site:sap.com

entry.title: Re: Custom ABAP Class using SO_DOCUMENT_READ_API1
entry.content: Please don't post an answer for comments, asking or giving additional details. Answer is reserved to propose a solution. Instead, use Replies > Comment (on the question or on a proposed answer).

entry.title: Re: Test Sequences with Focused Build Test Steps
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am currently creating a test scenario with public Result Attributes used in a Test Sequence.

Unfortunately, during execution I am not able to see the Result Attribute values from my previously executed test cases. (The sequence contains 10 cases, some of them have at least one Result Attribute which is mandatory, mapped to a test step and "Public in Test Sequence") 

I already checked with a colleague about all relevant settings but it seems that there is no error from my side with the configuration from Result Attributes, Test Sequence, Test Case as well as the Test Plan. I already searched for known bugs but can't find anything about this...
Anyone else who has the same issue or a solution?

Thank you and regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Associate – SAP S/4HANA Sales 2022
entry.content: @David_Chaviano

entry.title: Re: Footnote in adobe form
entry.content: The problem is precisely understanding on which page a specific footnote appears. In the print version, I have various dynamic tables, consequently I don't know in advance on which page the specific note will appear.

entry.title: Firebase and last 4.12.107 Runtime Issues
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I'm encountering an issue with the latest version of the Client Runtime.
My app compiles and uploads correctly to the Google Play Console, but when I download it and try to run it on my smartphone, it doesn't launch, and the screen displays this error:

 

com.facebook.react.common.JavascriptException: Error: No Firebase App '[DEFAULT]' has been created - call firebase.initializeApp(), js engine: hermes, stack:

getApp@555238:21
firebaseModuleWithApp@556316:66
anonymous@837:35
loadModuleImplementation@158:13
guardedLoadModule@96:37
metroRequire@38:91
anonymous@825:13
loadModuleImplementation@158:13
guardedLoadModule@89:46
metroRequire@38:91
global@660636:3

at com.facebook.react.modules.core.ExceptionsManagerModule.reportException (ExceptionsManagerModule.java:65)

at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Native Method)

at com.facebook.react.bridge.JavaMethodWrapper.invoke(JavaMethodWrapper.java:372)

 

It seems to be an issue related to Firebase configuration but i never configured Firebase on this app.

With this version of the Client Runtime, it's the first time I've encountered this issue.
Has anyone else experienced this?

THANX!

entry.title: Re: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes. Its getting you are not entitled for SAP
entry.content: No I didnt found the solution yet

Adam

entry.title: What is the name of the table?What is the purpose of the following Dynamic List Display table?
entry.content: What is the name of the table below? How it is used?

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 - Table, select multiple rows programmatically.
entry.content: Hi Dennis,

entry.title: Commitment Item can not be assigned to G/L account although FSG is maintained (Error FIPOS 019)
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I activated the project cash management, using transaction OPI6 in SAP S/4HANA .

When I try to execute FIPOS to create commitment items, the following error appears - even after changing the FSG as mentioned in the procedure below (with T-Code OBC4). Can anyone help out? 

Many thanks in advance!

 

Errors occurred as the G/L accounts were being saved

Message no. FIPOS019

Diagnosis

The commitment item cannot be assigned to the G/L account because the state of the G/L account does not permit this transaction.

System Response

The G/L accounts affected are not saved. They have the status Inconsistent.

If you have created a new commitment item for the G/L accounts, the system saves that commitment item.

Procedure

Correct the G/L accounts, thereby making entry of commitment items possible.

Check the relevant G/L accounts: Change G/L Account.

It is possible that the commitment item field is hidden in the field status group for the G/L account.

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Implementing Custom Chart of Acc...
entry.content: Hi, Thank you for your prompt response. I hope you are doing well. If I use the standard COA and change the number ranges using the "Renumber GL Account" feature to align them with the client’s GL number range, is there an uploader available for this activity? We have more than 700 GL accounts that need to be adjusted to match the client’s GL number range.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 - Table, select multiple rows programmatically.
entry.content:
Hi Dennis,

It is a very simple solution but an effective one.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: I need Badi of Purchase Order change
entry.content:
Hi @ddA 

 

Please follow the instructions in the Community Thread below and it will show what BADI's

are available for the app you want to use 

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-find-out-badis-of-post-general-journal-entries-app/qaq-p/13893686/comment-id/4887617#M4887617

 

Best Regards

Enda

Dileep Naidu

entry.title: Re: Retry failed messages in CPI with automatic and manual reprocessing capabilities
entry.content: Thank you Daniel, for your inputs. However, in our case we had existing iflows running in Production and we could not make major changes to it. Hence, we implemented this using the exception subprocess

entry.title: Re: 2024-2H-LMS Release LRN-154487 Browse Library Feature...
entry.content: Well...I may have spoken to soon. I swear it worked once yesterday. I got busy with a different task and went back to do some further testing and since the 1 time yesterday it no longer works. I will be putting in a SAP ticket today because I agree...the new permission isn't listed in the ALL role.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm a Procurement Specialist who is interested in improving SAP skills in order to switch job, so I'm interested in this initiative as well.

Thanks,

Sofoklis

entry.title: Re: How to change source HU during picking by using excep...
entry.content:
Hi 

I found some thing see if it works 

Use ''List'' to pick the required exception code, BIDF( Full Pick denial), system will either propose 2 things

1) It will propose an alternate HU or different storage bin

2) If it fails to find the the above, it will create a Physical inventory document.

However, BIDF can undoubtedly be used to pick quantity from different source HU,

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Compliance-Proof Storage of Attachments in SAP FI Objects
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have two questions regarding the compliance-proof storage of attachments added to SAP FI objects in S4 Public Cloud:

  1. Question: Where can we find proof that SAP FI documents, including their attachments, are stored in S4 Public cloud a compliance-proof (audit-proof) manner? Are there any official documents or certificates that confirm this?

  2. Question: Do the attachments follow the deletion and archiving retention periods of their respective SAP FI objects? Specifically, we are interested in how this can be configured in the public cloud, particularly within the scope items 5LE and 1KA and if the attachments follow the rules of the SAP Finance Object. 

Thank you in advance for your support and insights!

Best regards,

Mara

entry.title: Re: How to send emails from Quality Notification Action Box
entry.content:
Hi @gg8 

 

There is no standard function for sending an email from the quality notification in S/4HANA Cloud 

You may check the Action Box functionality whether sending an email using the follow-up action is possible. Besides fulfilling all the prerequisites, you should implement your own logic in an implementation of FOA_EXECUTION_FOR_TASK.

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: powerbuilder 9 and powerbuilder 12
entry.content:
To explore source code (pb9 or pb12) on local environment, i need to install power builder 9 and power builder 12 and import source code locally. 
please help me  to get and install power builder 9 and power builder 12

entry.title: Re: SAC SSO Dynamic User Creatinon
entry.content:
Hi @Matthew_Shaw Thanks.

I can't see that in my SAC tenant. I don't understand why.

 

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: I have an S-User ID and i am trying to open KBA Notes...
entry.content: You should ask the authorizations to your SAP for Me portal Super Administrator (at your company). For information, the authorizations are explained here: https://support.sap.com/content/s4m/help/access/user-admin-concept.html. I can't find an authorization specific to viewing the SAP notes, but I guess you may display them if you have the authorization "Send Cases to SAP".

entry.title: Can we update batch characters to the batch while GR by using custom characters
entry.content:
I created a new character and assigned it to the class and then to the material master. 

Here I would like to update the ECN number to Batch while doing GR. I tried the table name and field name in characters. But its not working. 
How to find the tables, Fields which will update the class characters of batch.

entry.title: Re: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content:
This happens in a WEB app if you don't use sessions and postback:

1985571 - How to use sessions in web applications using the Crystal Reports viewer (the complete code)

See if that resolves the issue.

If it's a desktop app then likely you are using Refresh() in your code which will remove the current values.

Oh and I suggest updating to SP 36, CR for VS is only supported in the latest SP, SP 31 had issues in the viewer:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

entry.title: Re: Accounting transaction category RMWQRMWQ
entry.content: Can you please suggest

entry.title: In S4, the main table for financial data is ACDOCA, So how bseg and bkpf are still updated in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Simple question please : 

In S4, the main table for financial data is ACDOCA, So how BSEG and BKPF are still updated in S4HANA ? System duplicates data from ACDOCA to these tables ? Or maybe tcodes update these tables in parallel of ACDOCA ?

I do understand that they still exist because of specific programs or legacy systems that may use these historical tables, but don't understand yet how they still be updated ?

Thank you!

Regards,

MK

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 runtime engine
entry.content:
Use this one and add it to your Favourites:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Note the .NET installer is no longer installed with Crystal Reports and works with VS 2010->2022

Don't install the MSI packages on your DEV PC, use the EXE only. MSI's are for redistribution only.

entry.title: Re: XSD Validation for DMEEX
entry.content:
Hi @RichardKuba ,

thanks for this!

In our non-HANA systems we still use the DMEE. Is there any option to validate with the TVS schema files?

Kind regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Re: SAC SSO Dynamic User Creatinon
entry.content: Very weird that there is no 'SAML Mapping' column in Menu-Security-Users screen when you have SAML SSO setup to map on 'custom' (step 3 on that authentication setting page). This is most odd. I guess you've tried as system owner, used a different browser and keeping your fingers crossed! I don't get it. Time to log a support incident I would say. Please let us know what the cause was when you get it. All the best, Matthew

entry.title: Standard Tabs (Payment transactions and Address overview) are missing in BP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While creating or display of BP Master Standard tabs (Payment transactions and Address overview) are missing. We have already verified BUSD and required settings are already configured but still these tabs are missing.

Please can you let us know how to add missing standard tabs in BP.

Appreciate your help and support.

Thanks,

Vijay Elluri

entry.title: Re: 2024-2H-LMS Release LRN-154487 Browse Library Feature...
entry.content: The "Access Advanced Library Search" isn't going to be in the "ALL" role, as that's for Learning admins. It'll be found in the Learning user roles. What you might be facing is a bug, which is documented in the KBA 3528845 (https://me.sap.com/notes/3528845).

entry.title: Re: Top 10 takeaways #SAPTeched 2024
entry.content: Enjoyed reading! The Limiteless analogy was a great hook!

entry.title: Re: SAP Crystal Reports - Image Formatting
entry.content:
Check this KBA for registry keys for exporting and images to use:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2165260

entry.title: Re: The 2H 2024 Release of SAP SuccessFactors Learning – Key Highlights
entry.content:
Hello! When testing the new Advanced Library Search feature in our preview environment, I keep getting this error message below. I click on Browse, select a Category, and then get this page:

I have verified I have the right permissions. What else could this be?

entry.title: Re: Length Of Service /Age Story Reports
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks for this. When I set the date for Variable to 10 years in the future the Age doesn't reflect that date. I assume because the formula is looking at Currentdate. How do you get it to adjust the age based on the inputted date?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Which UI5 LTS Version will be the next one available...
entry.content: S/4HANA private cloud edition customers will get access to a new SAPUI5 version with S/4HANA 2025 FPS00. According to the current plan, this will be version 1.136, which is also expected to be the next the version with long-term maintenance support.

entry.title: How to develop Fiori List Report based on CDS View without Web IDE
entry.content:
Hi experts!

Currently I’m working on creating Fiori app that displays list report based on CDS View developed on Eclipse.

Since I don’t have a license to use Web IDE (SAP business application studio), I need to develop that Fiori app without web IDE.

So the question is whether it is possible or not to develop that Fiori app only by using eclipse?

And how can you do it?

 

I appreciate if you could answer my question.

Thank you so much in advance.

entry.title: Re: Combination Order DIMP, error "No order selected"
entry.content: Any body solved this issue?
